title: Blade Arcus from Shining: Battle Arena

notes: Controller button mapping is in correct
title: Blade Arcus from Shining: Battle Arena

notes:
This game detects my HP laptop accelerometer as the first gamepad so actual gamepad is detected as the second gamepad. This gamepad can be used in battle but cannot be used to navigate through menu and continue story mode. 
To disable the accelerometer run "sudo rmmod hp_accel" or add "blacklist hp_accel" to "/etc/modprobe.d/blacklist.conf" without quotes (requires root privileges and reboot).
NOTE an accelerometer is used to protect a hard drive against damage so this tweak is potentially DANGEROUS FOR YOUR HARDWARE!
title: Blade Arcus from Shining: Battle Arena
